_doc: Vendored snapshot of OpenAI's published model catalog. Used by tests/integration/runtime/test_cascade_ids_in_openai_published_catalog.py to assert every model_id referenced by the runtime appears in this snapshot. Per Quinn-R + Winston party-mode round-2 close-review (2026-04-26): an allowlist that silently rots is worse than no allowlist. Refresh discipline below is load-bearing for the test's value.

_provenance.snapshot_method: operator-verified against current OpenAI public docs at snapshot date; 2026-06-21 refresh adds gpt-5.5 (vision-capable, released 2026-04-24) and gpt-5.4 (priced + in-registry since 2026-06-11) — operator-session catalog refreshes consistent with the real OpenAI catalog
_provenance.refresh_cadence: quarterly OR whenever OpenAI publishes a model catalog change OR whenever runtime config references a model not in this snapshot
_provenance.deferred_inventory_followon: openai-catalog-snapshot-staleness-ci-warn — file CI guard that fails build if next_refresh_due_by has passed
